name: Saffron Buns
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven for 20 minutes before buns are ready to bake at 375°F. Makes 16 buns.
Scald the milk; stir in the sugar, salt, and butter.
Cool to lukewarm. Meanwhile, add saffron to boiling water; let stand.
Measure very warm water into a large bowl (cool to lukewarm for yeast). Stir in lukewarm milk mixture, beaten egg, saffron, and 2 cups flour; beat until smooth. Stir in currants, then enough flour to make stiff dough. Knead about 8 minutes. Place in greased bowl; cover and let rise (1 hour).
Punch down. Cover and let rise for an additional 10 minutes.
Shape into 16 buns. Press down each one. Cover and let rise 30 minutes. Bake in oven at 375°F for 15 minutes.
